name: clickhouse
description: Manage ClickHouse Cloud organizations and services

envVars.name: CLICKHOUSE_KEY_ID
envVars.description: ClickHouse Cloud API key ID (used as the HTTP Basic username)

envVars.name: CLICKHOUSE_KEY_SECRET
envVars.description: ClickHouse Cloud API key secret (used as the HTTP Basic password)

tools.name: List Organizations
tools.description: List organizations the API key has access to

tools.name: List Services
tools.description: List all ClickHouse services in an organization

historicalSummary.omitted: endpoint lists, IP access lists, and scaling configuration

tools.name: Get Service
tools.description: Get details of a ClickHouse service, including endpoints and state

prompts.title: Service overview
prompts.prompt: List my ClickHouse Cloud services with their state, provider, and region.

prompts.title: Check a service
prompts.prompt: Get the details of my ClickHouse Cloud service and tell me whether it is running and where its endpoints are.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: ClickHouse Cloud API Setup

steps.title: Sign in to ClickHouse Cloud
steps.description: Go to https://console.clickhouse.cloud and sign in (a free trial organization with one service is enough for testing).

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: In the console, open the API Keys tab in the left menu, click New API Key, choose permissions (developer for read-only is sufficient for these tools), and set an expiration.

steps.title: Copy the key ID and secret
steps.description: Copy the Key ID and Key Secret immediately — they are not shown again. Add them to your .env as CLICKHOUSE_KEY_ID and CLICKHOUSE_KEY_SECRET.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Organizations, then List Services with the organization ID it returns.

notes: Authentication is HTTP Basic: the key ID is the username and the key secret is the password
This connector targets the ClickHouse Cloud management API (api.clickhouse.cloud), not the SQL interface of your ClickHouse database
API responses wrap payloads in a top-level 'result' field
